rationale: Both reviews correctly assess the file as well-placed in `TauCeti/NumberTheory/Multiquadratic/`. Review 2's only finding — a potentially unused `import Mathlib.Algebra.Ring.Commute` — is tangential to the placement rubric, cannot be confirmed correct without running Lean (the proof uses `sq_eq_sq_iff_eq_or_eq_neg` which may draw on ring-level Commute lemmas), and is at most a minor cleanup that reasonable maintainers would not insist on under a placement review.
